senses.gloss: elative degree of صَحِيح (ṣaḥīḥ):; truer; truest
elative degree of صَحِيح (ṣaḥīḥ):; more right, more correct; most right, most correct
elative degree of صَحِيح (ṣaḥīḥ):; more genuine; most genuine
elative degree of صَحِيح (ṣaḥīḥ):; sounder, healthier; soundest, healthiest

etymology.text: Elative of صَحِيح (ṣaḥīḥ, “true; right, correct; genuine; sound, healthy”).
